ops.title: The codex (gpt-5.6-sol/luna) lane is usage-capped until 2026-07-25 ~15:25 PT — route sol-lane work to opus/fable meanwhile
ops.body:
On 2026-07-19 `codex-ask` failed immediately with "You've hit your usage limit … try again at Jul 25th, 2026 3:25 PM" (ChatGPT-plan OAuth quota; codex-ask deliberately unsets OPENAI_API_KEY, so there is no API-key fallback). Until 2026-07-25 ~15:25 PT every codex lane — sol implementation, finder/refuter review, luna recon — is unavailable.

**How to apply:** don't burn a dispatch discovering this again; route sol-lane implementation to opus xhigh and review/verification lanes to opus/fable (same-or-higher tier than the work), per the Models table escalation rule. Delete this memory after 2026-07-25.
